eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Douglas; Lyon; Storey; Carson City, NV; at 9:41 AM on APR 24, 2019 Effective until 9:56 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Douglas County authorities have issued a required weekly test for Douglas, Alpine, Carson City, Storey and Lyon Counties.  This is only a test No action required.
